parents.subject: LU-20096 ldlm: alloc stats before procfs

commit.subject: LU-20174 utils: check fp_thread_count > 1 for pfind
commit.message:
LU-20174 utils: check fp_thread_count > 1 for pfind

In llapi_find(), we should check fp_thread_count > 1 to call
parallel_find().

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: 23d9d6b1fb7d ("LU-17814 utils: implement thread pool")
Signed-off-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I206860d2b21bafbf581bdb0703b80dcadb8486d4
